mapper.sql: exam_id, user_id, subject_id, level_code, status, result_status, total_problem_count, correct_count, retry_count, started_at, submitted_at, graded_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM exam_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY exam_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM exam_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY exam_id DESC

SELECT
FROM exam_sessions ORDER BY exam_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_sessions ( user_id, subject_id, level_code, status, result_status, total_problem_count, correct_count, retry_count, started_at, submitted_at, graded_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{subjectId}, #{levelCode}, #{status}, #{resultStatus}, #{totalProblemCount}, #{correctCount}, #{retryCount}, #{startedAt}, #{submittedAt}, #{gradedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_sessions SET user_id = #{userId}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, level_code = #{levelCode}, status = #{status}, result_status = #{resultStatus}, total_problem_count = #{totalProblemCount}, correct_count = #{correctCount}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, started_at = #{startedAt}, submitted_at = #{submittedAt}, graded_at = #{gradedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_id = #{examId}

UPDATE exam_sessions SET status = #{status}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, started_at = #{startedAt}, submitted_at = #{submittedAt}, graded_at = #{gradedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_id = #{examId}

UPDATE exam_sessions SET status = #{status}, result_status = #{resultStatus}, correct_count = #{correctCount}, submitted_at = #{submittedAt}, graded_at = #{gradedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
